medical_history.history_of_present_illness: The patient is a ___ s/p two weeks from a L TKA. The patient was seen in the office for a post-operative visit and was found to have the middle third of her incision dehisced - which was repaired with sutures in the office. Over the following three days, the wound dehiscence progressed and the patient returned for re-evaluation. At this visit it was determined that the patient should be admitted and taken to the OR for I&D.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Rheumatoid arthritis, hypertension, breast cancer, thyroid cyst.

physical_examination.general_examination: Afebrile, VSS, A/Ox3, LCTA bilaterally, RRR, ABD soft, NTND, +BS, BLE fully NVI distally with 2+ DP pulses and full strength throughout. Painful and limited ROM of L TKA. 3cm area of wound dehiscence with serous drainage from the wound.
